name: CoreOperations
description: Crucial tools for interacting with the file system (list, read, write, delete files) and executing code or shell commands (run python, run bash/shell commands). Select this if the user wants you to edit files, check directories, run scripts, or perform any local system operations.

capabilities.name: list_session_files
capabilities.description: List all files in the current session (DB). Returns a JSON string of file list with id, name, and size.

capabilities.name: export_session_file
capabilities.description: Export a binary file (e.g. PDF, ZIP, Excel) from the session database to the local filesystem. Use this when you need to process binary files with python scripts or shell commands.

file_id.description: The ID of the file to export

target_path.description: The local directory or full file path where the file should be saved. Defaults to current working directory if not provided.

capabilities.name: send_file
capabilities.description: Send a file to the user. This is the exclusive file-delivery tool for user-facing file output. Provide the absolute file path.

file_path.description: The absolute path of the file to send.

capabilities.name: read_session_file
capabilities.description: Read the content of a file from the session (DB) by its ID. ONLY text files are supported. DO NOT use this for images or binary files.

file_id.description: The ID of the file to read

capabilities.name: list_files
capabilities.description: List files in a directory on the local filesystem.

dir_path.description: The absolute path of the directory to list (optional, defaults to root).

capabilities.name: read_file
capabilities.description: Read the content of a file from the local filesystem. ONLY text files are supported. DO NOT use this for images or binary files.

file_path.description: The absolute path of the file to read.

capabilities.name: write_file
capabilities.description: Write content to a file on the local filesystem. Creates directories if needed.

file_path.description: The absolute path of the file to write.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

capabilities.name: delete_file
capabilities.description: Delete a file or empty directory from the local filesystem.

file_path.description: The absolute path of the file/directory to delete.

capabilities.name: run_command
capabilities.description: Execute a shell command on the server. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.
